name: bdigital-public
description: Claude Code plugins distributed alongside the bdigital media engineering blog. Self-contained, MIT-licensed, and tied to a specific published walkthrough.

plugins.name: session-handoff
plugins.description: User-invocable skill that generates a distilled brief so a fresh Claude Code session can resume where the previous one left off. Implements the 'Clear with a brief' pattern from Anthropic's session management guide.

plugins.name: cc-context-monitor
plugins.description: User-invocable skill that configures a color-coded Claude Code statusline showing current context window usage, rolling session token usage, and 7-day weekly usage by wrapping ccusage with threshold-based color cues.
